escalatedRisks.risk: 🎉🎉🎉 MU Q3 FY2026 RECORD EARNINGS — $41.46B revenue (+346% YoY, beat consensus by 17%), $25.11 EPS (beat by 25%), 84.9% GM. Q4 guide $50B/$31 EPS. CEO: 'Tightness locked in to persist beyond calendar 2027'. MU second trading day -6.7% profit-taking to $1,132.33 — still well above pre-earnings $1,048.
escalatedRisks.status: SECOND DAY PROFIT-TAKING — June 27, 2026 09:00。MU closed $1,132.33 (-6.7%) on June 26, from high $1,255 to low $1,121.56。Typical post-earnings profit-taking — fundamentals unchanged at $41.46B/$50B。Still +24.4% from KOSPI bottom $910。
escalatedRisks.source: Micron IR June 24, 2026 / MarketBeat / Benzinga / Seeking Alpha / TweakTown / Investing.com
escalatedRisks.detail: The $41.46B revenue beat represents the single largest positive surprise in storage industry history. Second trading day saw -6.7% profit-taking to $1,132.33 — a healthy technical correction that doesn't challenge the fundamental thesis. Still well above pre-earnings $1,048. Q4 $50B guide implies continued NAND/DRAM ASP strength.

DDR5 RDIMM 32GB module spot jumping to $1,275 (+2.00%) shows finished module prices still catching up to die-level spot. DDR4 $72.317 new ATH confirms the bull market continues rotating to mid-tier products.

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴🔴🔴 MLC NAND spot panic buying — FINAL WEEKEND. MLC 64Gb $28.182 (▲+6.17%), MLC 32Gb $14.000 (▲+5.53%) — largest single-session MLC spot gains in tracking history. 3 days until June 30 permanent exit.
escalatedRisks.status: FINAL WEEKEND PANIC — June 27, 2026。MLC 64Gb ▲+6.17% to $28.182, MLC 32Gb ▲+5.53% to $14.00。Largest single-session MLC gains recorded。3 days until permanent exit on June 30 (Monday)。TLC wafer $20.431 ▼-1.00% — NAND spot mixed but MLC isolated panic continues。
escalatedRisks.detail: The MLC NAND spot market is experiencing last-minute panic buying。MLC 64Gb surged +6.17% in a single session — the largest spike in tracking history — as buyers rush to secure remaining inventory before June 30。Simultaneously, 512Gb TLC wafer prices declined -1.00% to $20.431, creating a curious divergence: MLC panic vs TLC calm。MLC demand will inevitably spill into TLC/QLC after June 30。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🆕🆕 SK Hynix DDR5 profitability at 90% — officially exceeds HBM margins. Signed 3-year Microsoft DDR5 supply agreement. Converting HBM3E production line to DDR5. HBM4 full-year shipment forecast revised down from 4.5B Gb to 4B Gb. 5-year plan to double total wafer capacity. US ADR listing to raise up to $29.4B now confirmed.
escalatedRisks.status: DEEPENING — June 27, 2026 09:00。No new developments since yesterday。Microsoft 3-year DDR5 deal with minimum price guarantee and 10-30% upfront payment remains the strongest structural support。DDR5 profitability at 90% unprecedented。

escalatedRisks.detail: SK Hynix's DDR5 strategy deepening。US ADR listing confirmation broadens investor access。Microsoft 3-year deal with minimum price guarantee and upfront payment represents unprecedented long-term commitment from a hyperscaler。DDR5 exceeding HBM margins is the strongest possible structural confirmation of the DDR5 bull market。

escalatedRisks.status: FINAL WEEKEND WINDOW — June 26, 2026。4 days until MLC NAND permanent exit on June 30。Phison CEO confirms shortage 'no end in sight' through Q2 2027 — independent validation of MU CEO's 'tightness beyond 2027'。NAND contract Q2 +70-75%, cumulative x4.2-x4.5。This is the last complete work-week Friday before MLC exit。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🟢🟢🟢 WF6 SUPPLY CRISIS RESOLVED — Kanto Denka + Central Glass suspended July 1 permanent shutdown on June 19 after securing Chinese tungsten export quota allocations. 8 days resolved with no new developments.
escalatedRisks.status: RESOLVED (DOWNGRADED from CRITICAL to ELEVATED then to MONITOR) — June 26, 2026 09:00。8 days since resolution with no new developments。WF6 production continues。NAND price expansion now solely driven by demand + MLC exit + Phison CEO confirmation。

escalatedRisks.detail: Risk resolved for 8 days with no new developments。Markets have fully absorbed the resolution。MU $41.46B record earnings + Phison CEO confirmation + MU CEO tightness-beyond-2027 = NAND demand sufficient to sustain pricing without WF6 supply shock。
